title: CT2.decide.context completed discharge record — Candidate-specific context certification — certificate or separating context
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT2-v2 node CT2.decide.context. It fixes the runtime identity, presentation order, successful status, and exact contract evidence without converting the semantic ID back to a numbered obligation ID.

tacticId.description: Owning tactic discriminator for CT2.decide.context; it must be CT2.

nodeId.description: Stable semantic runtime identifier for Candidate-specific context certification — certificate or separating context.

nodeNumber.description: One-based presentation-order index for CT2.decide.context; it is not part of the semantic identity.

status.description: Required successful completion state for CT2.decide.context, matching its decision runtime role.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT2.decide.context: S-Dich, S-Equiv.

contains.description: Requires S-Dich, which provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.
Requires S-Equiv, which certifies the selected replacement candidate or records a separating context.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT2.decide.context; one S-Dich, S-Equiv record is required for each declared family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the S-Dich evidence at CT2.decide.context; this instance provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.
Discriminator for the S-Equiv evidence at CT2.decide.context; this instance certifies the selected replacement candidate or records a separating context.

statement.informal: Candidate-specific context certification — certificate or separating context.

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Supply the declared proof-carrying state, decision, certificate, or payload. Every outgoing edge is available only through its named typed constructor and evidence slots.
